title: Faster Deepslate
description: This makes deepslate mine just as fast as its normal/stone variant
body:
# Faster Deepslate
This mod makes deepslate mine as fast as its normal variant:

- Cobbled deepslate -> Cobblestone
- Cobbled deepslate stairs -> Cobblestone stairs
- Cobbled deepslate slab -> Cobblestone slab
- Cobbled deepslate wall -> Cobblestone wall
- Deepslate -> Stone
- Deepslate copper ore -> Copper ore
- Deepslate coal ore -> Coal ore
- Deepslate iron ore -> Iron ore
- Deepslate gold ore -> Gold ore
- Deepslate lapis ore -> Lapis ore
- Deepslate redstone ore -> Redstone ore
- Deepslate emerald ore -> Emerald ore
- Deepslate diamond ore -> Diamond ore
